caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hooded sweatshirt with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold letters, and a gold watch on his left wrist is seated in a studio. He is wearing over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. To his left, a white backdrop features a logo with five stars and the text "UNICORN MUSTLE" repeated vertically. Behind him, a blue sign reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". A small black screen on the desk displays "TALK OUT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and looks toward his right, speaking. His mouth opens and closes as he talks, and his facial expression shifts slightly while he maintains his gaze off-camera. The camera angle and the positioning of the equipment remain static across the frames.
